label: Pawn capacity offset
description: Adds an offset to a stat based on how efficiently the pawn performs a body capacity.

capacity.label: Capacity
capacity.description: PawnCapacityDef whose efficiency value is used to compute the offset.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Multiplier applied to (capacity efficiency - 1) to compute the offset. Default is 1.

max.label: Max
max.description: Upper bound on the capacity efficiency before scaling. Default is 9999 (effectively uncapped).
